I've only lived through a couple of these storms, but I haven't experienced that yet. I just looked into it, apparently it can happen on the outer bands where the convection isn't as strong.
thank you for looking that up 🙂

Wind direction. Thunder storms have vertical winds. Thunder and lightning happen when the wind takes the moisture up to the cold air. Tropical storms/hurricanes have horizontal winds, so the moisture doesn't rise upward like it does in thunderstorms.
